thig5.2:2.3: I stood at the door to the brothel:
thig5.2:2.4: a hunter with snare laid out.
thig5.2:3.2: and revealed many a private part.
thig5.2:3.4: laughing out loud at the crowd.
thig5.2:4.1: Today, wrapped in a double cloak, my head shaven,
thig5.2:4.3: I sit at the foot of a tree
thig5.2:4.4: and attain the state of no-thought.
